issues.detail: The skill does not fully cover error handling and edge cases such as Redis downtime or job failure scenarios.

scenarios.name: BullMQ PDF report job with progress polling
scenarios.rationale: Baseline typically constructs Queue+Worker and may call updateProgress, but often skips graceful SIGTERM shutdown via worker.close(); treatment hits progress updates, connection config, and graceful shutdown.

scenarios.name: Email queue with rate limiting and priority
scenarios.rationale: Baseline knows concurrency and priority exist but may guess the limiter shape wrong; treatment uses the exact { max: 100, duration: 60000 } limiter and priority: 1 patterns from the skill.
